title: Click Script Reference
summary: The click script runs in the server sandbox on every Atari room click and popup click. Return null for no action, a string as a displayText shortcut, or an action built with the helpers below.

values.name: roomName
values.description: Resolved current room name used by the server.

values.name: requestedRoomName
values.description: Original room token from the request before fallback resolution.

values.name: x
values.description: Pixel X coordinate in 0..319. Equal to logicalX * 2.

values.name: clickType
values.description: Whether the current event came from the room image or a popup click.

values.name: popupClick
values.description: Popup click context with lineNumber, columnNumber, word, choiceId, choiceText, value, and meta when clickType === 'popup'.

values.name: clickedLine / clickedColumn
values.description: Popup line and column shortcuts extracted from popupClick.

values.name: clickedWord
values.description: Word under the popup cursor, or empty string when none.

values.name: clickedChoice / clickedChoiceText
values.description: Choice id and rendered text for clickable popup choices.

values.name: state / gameState / scriptState
values.description: The same persistent JSON-safe state object saved to data/scriptState.json after the script finishes.

values.name: roomSelections
values.description: Selections for the current room only.

values.name: selections
values.description: Flattened selections from all rooms. Each item includes roomName.

values.name: rooms
values.description: All rooms with their selections, slides, and script-friendly metadata.

helpers.name: changeRoom(roomName)
helpers.description: Reload the Atari client into another room by name.

helpers.name: displayText(text)
helpers.description: Show popup text. Long text is wrapped and clipped to 3 lines of 19 characters.

helpers.name: displayText({ text | message | lines, clickable, selectable, choices })
helpers.description: Advanced popup form. Set clickable/selectable true for popup click handling, or pass choices directly.

helpers.name: choice(id, text, options)
helpers.description: Build one clickable choice line for use with displayChoices(). Options may include value or meta.

helpers.name: displayChoices(choices, options)
helpers.description: Show up to 3 clickable popup lines. Each line becomes a popup choice.

helpers.name: replaceGraphics(selectionName)
helpers.description: Use a saved image selection by name from the current room when the name is unique.

helpers.name: replaceGraphics({ selection, room, x, y, width, height })
helpers.description: Draw an image selection patch. selection can come from the current room or an explicit room. x/y/width/height can override placement within the stored patch bounds.

helpers.name: replaceGraphics({ room, sourceRoom, x, y, width, height })
helpers.description: Copy a rectangular patch from a room image instead of an image selection.

helpers.name: originalGraphics()
helpers.description: Restore the full original room image.

helpers.name: originalGraphics(selectionName | payload)
helpers.description: Restore just the affected rectangle. The payload format matches replaceGraphics().

helpers.name: replaceGraphisc / originalGraphisc / orginalGraphics / orginalGraphisc
helpers.description: Compatibility typo aliases kept for older scripts.

returnValues.name: null or undefined
returnValues.description: Do nothing and leave the current room unchanged.

returnValues.name: action object
returnValues.description: A helper result from changeRoom, displayText, replaceGraphics, or originalGraphics.

returnValues.name: array
returnValues.description: If you return an array, the first truthy item is used.

structures.name: Selection
structures.description: id, roomName (only in global selections), type, name, description, x, y, width, height, visible, showOnClient, visibleInPage, locked.

structures.name: Room
structures.description: id, name, title, slides, and selections. Each selection uses the same fields as above.

limits.name: Popup line width
limits.description: Each line is sanitized and clipped to 19 characters.

limits.name: State persistence
limits.description: Only plain JSON-safe object data should be stored in state/gameState/scriptState.

limits.name: Script runtime
limits.description: The sandbox is short-lived and timed; keep scripts fast and side-effect free beyond state updates.

serverSpecials.name: resetgame selection
serverSpecials.description: A clicked topmost selection named resetgame is intercepted by the server. It deletes data/scriptState.json, clears transient popup/click state, and reloads the first room without running the click script.

relatedFiles.name: data/clickscript.js
relatedFiles.description: The live click script executed by the server sandbox for room clicks and popup clicks.

relatedFiles.name: data/scriptState.json
relatedFiles.description: JSON object automatically loaded into state/gameState/scriptState and saved back after each click when the script changes it.

relatedFiles.name: data/rooms.json
relatedFiles.description: Main room database. Stores room names, slide metadata, selections, descriptions, visibility flags, and image-selection file references.

relatedFiles.name: data/rooms/<roomId>/slide-*.vbxe
relatedFiles.description: Per-room VBXE background image files used by the Atari client and by room-based graphics patch actions.

relatedFiles.name: data/rooms/<roomId>/selection-*.png
relatedFiles.description: Stored PNG fragment for an image selection. Used by the web editor preview and management UI.

relatedFiles.name: data/rooms/<roomId>/selection-*.vbxe
relatedFiles.description: Stored VBXE patch for an image selection. Used by replaceGraphics('selectionName') and related payload forms in-game.

relatedFiles.name: data/selections.json
relatedFiles.description: Removed legacy export file. It is no longer used by the server or client; data/rooms.json is the canonical source now.

relatedFiles.name: server/server.js
relatedFiles.description: Defines the click-script sandbox values/helpers, popup limits, special server-side actions like resetgame, and the HTTP routes used by the game and web editor.

relatedFiles.name: docs/click-script-reference.md
relatedFiles.description: Human-readable reference for the click scripting API.

relatedFiles.name: docs/click-script-reference.json
relatedFiles.description: Structured reference consumed by the built-in Script help popup in the web editor.

examples.title: Show the clicked selection name
Clickable popup choices
Move to another room
Draw and later restore an image selection
